prompt: Bubble board cue: tap flop left.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before tournament-pressure action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_left is the board anchor, so the tournament read starts from the first card that frames the flop texture.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The left flop card is the target board card because the bubble board read starts from that first street cue.
